nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Saltatricula
nodes.summary: Saltatricula（Saltatricula）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联2种鸟类，如Black-throated saltator、Many-colored Chaco finch。

nodes.name: 玻利維亞

nodes.name: Black-throated saltator
nodes.summary: The black-throated saltator (Saltatricula atricollis) is a species of songbird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, and Paraguay. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forests and dry savanna. References
